name: 2D DP — Grid Paths, Edit Distance, Knapsack

metadata.career_relevance: Core DP patterns — highest-value DSA topic in senior interviews.

hook.what_you_will_build: 2D DP — Grid Paths, Edit Distance, Knapsack

key_takeaways: Unique Paths: dp[j]+=dp[j-1]; O(n) rolling row
0/1 Knapsack: iterate j BACKWARDS; dp[j]=max(dp[j], dp[j-w]+v)
Unbounded Knapsack: iterate j FORWARDS; allows reuse
Partition Equal Subset: knapsack variant; boolean dp[target+1]
Longest Common Subsequence: review from M31 T5
